title: Day 16 Operational Readiness and Pilot Authorization Gate

items.title: Current-main integration audit
items.finding: Day15 baseline plus four additive core-text/reference commits; no overlap with activation artifacts.

items.title: Profile content readiness
items.finding: Four Profiles remain internally ready pending affected-person review.

items.title: Role and conflict protocol
items.finding: Eight roles, acceptance, conflict, qualification, and independence checks are defined.

items.title: Protocol approval infrastructure
items.finding: Seven protocols have synthetic-use design approval and explicit human-use approval gates.

items.title: Restricted evidence environment design
items.finding: Eight live controls are specified with synthetic-only repository enforcement.

items.title: Controlled pilot class matrix
items.finding: CP0 and CP1 are separated from CP2 and CP3.

items.title: Synthetic scenario coverage
items.finding: Twelve synthetic scenarios cover four Profiles and cross-profile stop/deletion boundaries.

items.title: Synthetic pilot execution
items.finding: Twelve scenarios passed with zero real evidence and zero live actions.

items.title: Status and claim boundary
items.finding: Charter, RFC, Profile, human review, and implementation-conformance statuses remain unchanged.

items.title: Conflict and qualification checks
items.finding: No real assignee exists; checks cannot be completed.

items.title: Human-use protocol approvals
items.finding: Seven protocols remain NotApproved for human use.

items.title: Provisioned restricted evidence environment
items.finding: Live environment controls remain unprovisioned or unconfigured.

items.title: Jurisdiction and professional qualification
items.finding: No defined operating jurisdiction and qualified approval exists.

requires: All eight roles assigned to named accountable people
Conflict, qualification, and independence checks completed
All seven protocols approved for human use
Restricted evidence environment provisioned and tested
